name: Create Lewis Dot Structure Lesson
description: Create a 4-page chemistry lesson flipchart about Lewis Dot Structures. The flipchart must include a title page ('Lewis Dot Structures') with the text 'Covalent Bonding' and a definition of the Octet Rule; a reference page ('Valence Electrons') showing the element symbols for H, C, N, O, and Cl with their valence electrons; a worked example page ('Water (H2O)') showing the Lewis structure for water; and a practice page ('Practice') listing the molecules CO2, NH3, and CH4. Save the final file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/lewis_dot_structures.flipchart.
